title: ZXSpace Complete Guide
description: Everything you need to know about ZXSpace, from defending your first city to unlocking achievements, earning BarkinMad Coins, and mastering every alien wave.
summary: Learn how to play ZXSpace, improve your skills, unlock rewards, and defend your cities against increasingly dangerous alien invasions.

sections.heading: Welcome to ZXSpace
paragraphs: ZXSpace is a fast-paced city-defence arcade shooter and part of the ZX Series from BarkinMad Studios.
Protect your cities from waves of invading aliens, repair damaged shields, collect powerful upgrades, and survive increasingly difficult attacks.

sections.heading: Everything You Need to Learn
paragraphs: Start with the How to Play guide to learn the basics, then continue through the Controls and Game Modes pages to master your defensive skills.
Once you're comfortable with the gameplay, explore BarkinMad Coins, Achievements, Leaderboards, and Tips & Strategy to discover even more ways to improve.
bullets: How to Play – Learn the basics of city defence.
Controls – Master cannon movement and auto-fire.
Game Modes – Explore Solo Play and future multiplayer plans.
Progression – Unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and climb the leaderboards.

sections.heading: Growing with Every Update
paragraphs: ZXSpace continues to evolve with new features, artwork, and gameplay improvements planned for future updates.
As development continues, this guide will grow alongside the game with new content, screenshots, and gameplay features.

sections.heading: Keep Defending Your Cities
paragraphs: Every wave helps you improve your reactions, protect more cities, unlock achievements, and earn BarkinMad Coins.
Whether you're chasing a new high score or simply trying to survive one more wave, every game helps you become a stronger commander.

images.caption: Defend your cities against wave after wave of alien invaders.
Additional screenshots will be added as development continues.

featureShowcases.heading: Everything You Need to Master ZXSpace
featureShowcases.summary: From your first alien invasion to your highest score, this guide covers every part of ZXSpace.
body: Whether you're just beginning your first defence or aiming to master every wave, this guide brings together everything you need in one place.
Learn the controls, improve your strategy, unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and defend your cities against increasingly dangerous alien attacks.

image.caption: Everything you need to become a master city defender.

featureShowcases.heading: Every Wave Helps You Improve
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins reward every game you play.
body: As your skills improve, you'll unlock achievements, climb the leaderboards, and earn BarkinMad Coins to unlock cosmetic rewards across the ZX Series.
Every completed wave helps you become a stronger defender and prepares you for even greater challenges.

image.caption: Every wave brings you closer to your next achievement.
